description_long: This is a sturdy rectangular wooden table with a rustic appearance, featuring a plank-style tabletop composed of four wide wooden boards with visible grain and natural imperfections. The table is supported by four straight, robust legs, each connected by a horizontal stretcher near the base for added stability. The wood has a dark brown finish, giving it a weathered, outdoor-ready look suitable for parks, patios, or urban public spaces. The tabletop is thick and solid, with slightly beveled edges and visible seams between the planks. There are no visible decorative elements, hardware, or attached seating, emphasizing a utilitarian and functional design. The overall construction suggests durability and the ability to withstand outdoor conditions.
description: A robust, dark brown wooden table with a plank-style top and four sturdy legs, designed for outdoor or urban use. Its rustic finish and solid build make it ideal for parks or public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide plank tabletop and two front legs, with the horizontal stretcher visible below.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the tabletop planks and the alignment of the legs, with the stretcher bar clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the back two legs and the same plank arrangement on the tabletop.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the same plank and leg structure visible.
